rulings.Case Title: CHATEAU DE LOUIS,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. GENERAL WINDOW CORPORATION DBA INTERNATIONAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Leave To Intervene
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 31, 2012, Line 6. INTERVENOR EVEREST INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene. Granted. No opposition filed. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order with the name and address of the prevailing party's counsel or the prevailing party if pro per in the top left of the first page of proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing or email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing even if the motion is not opposed or the tentative ruling is not contested. =(302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: BORIS JAMES DAVISON VS. ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY FOUNDATION et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 31, 2012, Line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement. Hearing required. =(302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: ELBA LUCERO et al VS. DALE T. BOUTIETTE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Production Of Docs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 31, 2012, Line 5. DEFENDANT DALE BOUTIETTE, BOUTIETTE + VON HERMANN, LLP, BVH LAW GROUP, LLP'S Motion To Compel Production Of Docs. Hearing required. The Court has not received courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Plaintiffs shall deliver courtesy copies of opposing papers no later than 9:00 a.m. on Monday, December 31, 2012. If possible, Plaintiffs shall also send an electronic copy of their opposition papers to contestdept302tr@sftc.org as soon as possible. =(302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: R. R. VS. EL TRABAJO INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Deft'S Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Req. For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 31, 2012, Line 1, DEFENDANT EDWARD ALKHASOV'S Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set No One And Request For Sanctions. Continued on the Court's own motion to January 14, 2013 to give Defendant Edward Alkhasov the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant Alkhasov must deliver courtesy copies of his moving and reply papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than January 2, 2013, or the motions will be denied. = (302/JPT)

rulings.Case Title: PHIL SIEGLE VS. STELLA STARR INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Add Judgment Debtor Ccp 187
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 31, 2012, Line 2. ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA Motion To Add Judgment Debtor. Granted. No opposition filed. KATS Resources Ltd. is added as a judgment debtor in this action for all sums due and payable from the original debtor, Stella Starr Inc. Moving party shall prepare a proposed order granting this motion and a separate amended judgment. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. =(302/MJM)

Sustained with 15 days leave to amend from notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
